title: ziziphora bracteolata
intro: Ziziphora bracteolata, also known as Purple Dragon's Head or Red Ziziphora, is a perennial herb native to mountainous regions of Iran, Turkey, and the Caucasus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, including bronchitis and coughs. Ziziphora bracteolata is commonly prepared as an essential oil, tea, or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies.
